title: デビュー戦の後に・大型新人

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a showing! Let's hear it for the star
newcomer, Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Order executed. I have returned, Trainer.
choice_data_list: That was an awesome debut race!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I was able to adequately
display my current abilities.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Logging today's results and environmental data
to my database. I will work even harder for the
Triple Crown.

The next day, I overhear a familiar name coming
from a TV in an electronics store while strolling
through the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Television Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Boasting overwhelming speed since even before
entering the academy, Mihono Bourbon's the
hottest newcomer on the block!

text_block_list.name: Television Announcer
text_block_list.text:
She's one to keep an eye on in the future, folks!
Was that a great debut or what?!

The news continues with some spectator
interviews.

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text:
I've been following her career for a long time, so I
was incredibly excited to finally watch her debut
race!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
What a run! It's weird, but I felt exhilarated just
from watching her!

I notice an Umamusume looking intently at the
screen.

It's amazing how everyone's smiling when they
talk about Bourbon... She's so cool!

If I can even come close to performing like that in
the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe I'll finally be able to say goodbye to
the Rice Shower that only brings misfortune and
sadness to everyone...

Without interrupting her moment, I leave her
alone to intently watch the screen.
